# seerr_network_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr network settings via `/api/v1/settings/network`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_network_settings" "example" {}

output "network_timeout_ms" {
  value = data.seerr_network_settings.example.api_request_timeout_ms
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_request_timeout_ms` (Number) Maximum time in milliseconds Seerr waits for external API responses.
- `csrf_protection` (Boolean)
- `dns_cache` (Block, Read-only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dns_cache))
- `force_ipv4_first` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `proxy` (Block, Read-only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--proxy))
- `trust_proxy` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedblock--dns_cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dns_cache`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `force_max_ttl` (Number)
- `force_min_ttl` (Number)


<a id="nestedblock--proxy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `proxy`

Read-Only:

- `bypass_filter` (String)
- `bypass_local_addresses` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `hostname` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `port` (Number)
- `use_ssl` (Boolean)
- `user` (String)
